---
title: "High-resolution 3D phase-contrast imaging beyond the depth of field limit via ptychographic multi-slice electron tomography"
type: "article"
author: "A. V. Romanov, M. G. Cho, M. Scott, C. Ophus, P. Pelz"
year: "2023"
publication: "arXiv (Cornell University)"
preprint: ""
doi: "10.48550/arxiv.2311.02580"
materials: ""
code_url: ""
project_page_url: ""
toc: false
categories:
  - ptychography
  - tomography
  - imaging
# --- citation metrics (auto-managed; do not edit) ---
cited_by_count: 1
is_oa: true
oa_status: green
counts_by_year:
  - [2018, 0]
  - [2019, 0]
  - [2020, 0]
  - [2021, 0]
  - [2022, 0]
  - [2023, 0]
  - [2024, 0]
  - [2025, 1]
metrics_updated: "2026-05-02T16:15:23Z"
# --- end citation metrics ---
---
## Citation (APA 7)

> High-resolution 3D phase-contrast imaging beyond the depth of field limit via ptychographic multi-slice electron tomography
A. V. Romanov, M. G. Cho, M. Scott, C. Ophus, P. Pelz
arXiv (Cornell University)


## Abstract

[Abstract will be added manually]
